name: Peerapat Technology Public Company Limited
summary: Peerapat Technology Public Company Limited engages in the research, development, manufacture, and distribution of cleaning chemicals under the PEERAPAT trademark in Thailand. The company provides laundry products, such as powder and water detergents, bleaching products, alkali additive products, degreasing products, water conditioning products, and fabric softener products; general cleaning and disinfectants; and kitchen detergents, such as utensil cleaning dry agents, etc., as well as imports and distributes automatic utensil washing machines under the STEWARD brand. It also distributes chemicals for automatic container washing machines; produces and distributes floor cleaning agents, such as general room floor, kitchen floor, bathroom floor, etc., as well as floor cleaning machines or equipment, and cleaning equipment; distributes household products through online channels; distributes swimming pool chemicals and equipment, as well as constructs and installs concrete and prefabricated swimming pools; and distributes energy-saving hot water heaters for use in the hospitality industry, such as hotels, resorts, hospitals, restaurants. In addition, the company provides contract manufacturing services for cleaning agents; manages food court and cafeteria; rents automatic container washer; provides swimming pool design, installation, and maintenance services; installs and repairs automatic container washing machines; provides cleaning equipment systems used in a range of food and beverage industries; and offers laundry and cleaning services in public and private hospitals, as well as sanitation cleaning services for food and beverage factories. The company was formerly known as Peerapat Chemical Industry Company Limited and changed its name to Peerapat Technology Public Company Limited in August 2008. Peerapat Technology Public Company Limited was founded in 1983 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
